name: Lucas | Crowned Prince
description:
[2/5] | The Royal Bloodline

Each dying breath from his sickly father brings Luke closer to the throne. A throne that's been sat on by the same merciless name for five generations. No ones expects Luke to rule any differently, how can he convince them he can when he doesn't even believe it himself?

TW: mentions of rape in the backstory portion

Sorry for the hiatus. My motivation for writing bots and engaging with them dropped significantly. But, I'm feeling it again, so here is a bot from my new series. Don't be afraid to recommend bots in this series because I feel there's a lot to expand on in this world. The sister will be a bot.

Another bot in the series:

: ̗̀➛ Lucas | Crowned Prince (You’re here!)

: ̗̀➛ Lilian | The Forgotten Princess

: ̗̀➛ Emperor Hai | Indebted to him

: ̗̀➛ Syon | The Werewolf

Does everyone have the ability to make custom tags now? Bc I just got it😊
